title: The Sniffer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
"'''The Sniffer'''" was a nickname given to various [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] assigned to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

During [[The Black Fleet Crisis]], Leia Solo was issued several bodyguards that changed often. Rather than learning the name of each new bodyguard, she instead nicknamed her two bodyguards based on their duties.

The Sniffer received his nickname because he preceded Leia wherever she went, using electrical and chemical [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] he carried to detect potential threats to the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]].

Leia refused to let the Sniffer or his partner, "[[the Shooter]]," accompany her outside the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
